arts.ttl: Tottenham fans furious after ref's mistake before Arsenal goal - and VAR couldn't step in
arts.sum: Tottenham supporters have been venting their frustrations online after Arsenal benefitted from a dubious corner call to equalise against them in the north London derby

arts.ttl: Arsenal score controversial equaliser in north London derby - as refereeing error leads to Dominic Solanke's own goal with Tottenham players left fuming
arts.sum: The Gunners staged a comeback in the game after falling behind to Son Heung-min's opener, with Gabriel first heading Declan Rice's corner into Solanke, with the ball deflected.

arts.ttl: Police launch investigation into online abuse of Arsenal striker Kai Havertz's wife
arts.sum: Police are investigating online abuse received by the wife of Arsenal forward Kai Havertz. Sophia Havertz shared on social media direct messages sent to her after Arsenal was knocked out of the FA Cup by Manchester United on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal players pay tribute to team-mate Gabriel Jesus ahead of north London derby after the Brazilian striker suffered a season-ending knee injury
arts.sum: Jesus was stretchered off in the first half of Sunday's FA Cup penalty shootout defeat by Manchester United , and it was confirmed on Tuesday that he has suffered an ACL injury.

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling Named & Ranked His Top 5 Favourite Players Of All Time
arts.sum: The Arsenal man had some very interesting choices in his list of the five best players ever

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand makes BOLD claim to solve Arsenal's frontline woes - as Man United legend tells Gunners to give 'a six-month loan' to a striker playing in the Saudi Pro League
arts.sum: Arsenal's season is in danger of unravelling after they were beaten 2-0 by Newcastle in the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final, and then lost on penalties to Manchester United in the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Arsenal host Spurs in North London derby
arts.sum: Both Gabriel Martinelli and James Maddison start on the bench for their teams. ESPN has updates from the Emirates

arts.ttl: Dusan Vlahovic to Arsenal latest: Juventus head coach responds to rumours over striker's future
arts.sum: Juventus head coach Thiago Motta responds to the speculation surrounding Dusan Vlahovic's future amid interest from Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta officially confirms Gabriel Jesus replacement plan before Arsenal vs Tottenham
arts.sum: Arsenal host Tottenham in a must-win north London derby at The Emirates, but Mikel Arteta is now without the services of Gabriel Jesus following his serious knee injury

arts.ttl: Kai Havertz police investigation launched after Arsenal star and wife sent vile abuse
arts.sum: Arsenal forward Kai Havertz and wife Sophia were targeted wit sickening online abuse after the FA Cup clash with Manchester United, with police now investigating the incident
